case_title: KALINDI RENGIFO VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVSERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-08-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST KALINDI RENGIFO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DEBORAH LUBIN, CSR #3234. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENGIFO, KALINDI AS TO DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVSERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, (UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA AT SAN FRANCISCO) DBA UCSF MEDICAL CENTER KIRKWOOD M.D, KIMBERLY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-06-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-10-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-01-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
